question: Which of the following statements best describes the population change in Region P between 2002 and 2019?

options.A: The population in 2019 is higher than in 2002.
options.B: The population in 2019 is lower than in 2002.
options.C: The population in 2002 and 2019 is approximately the same.
options.D: The population first increased and then decreased back to its initial level by 2019.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes the series appear increasing when it is actually decreasing.
